github_issue.title: Add GET /health endpoint returning JSON status
github_issue.body:
The app needs a health check endpoint for monitoring.

Requirements:
- Add a GET /health route to server.js
- Return JSON: { "status": "ok", "timestamp": "<ISO 8601>" }
- Response content-type must be application/json
- Return HTTP 200 on success

This will be used by the load balancer to verify the app is running.
github_issue.author: e2e-tester
